sentences.arabic: الْإِيمَانُ هُوَ أَنْ نُؤْمِنَ بِاللهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ.
sentences.translation: Iman je da vjerujemo u Allaha, Njegove meleke, knjige i poslanike.
sentences.translationEn: Faith is to believe in Allah, His angels, His books, and His messengers.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ جِبْرِيلُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ لِيُعَلِّمَ النَّاسَ أُمُورَ دِينِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Džibril, alejhis-selam, je došao Vjerovjesniku da bi poučio ljude stvarima njihove vjere.
sentences.translationEn: Gabriel (peace be upon him) came to the Prophet to teach people the matters of their religion.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنِ الْإِيمَانِ: «أَنْ تُؤْمِنَ بِاللهِ، وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ، وَكُتُبِهِ، وَرُسُلِهِ، وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ، وَتُؤْمِنَ بِالْقَدَرِ خَيْرِهِ وَشَرِّهِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ، 8].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je o imanu rekao: 'Da vjeruješ u Allaha, Njegove meleke, Njegove knjige, Njegove poslanike, Sudnji dan, i da vjeruješ u odredbu dobra i zla.' [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o imanu, 8].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said about faith: 'To believe in Allah, His angels, His books, His messengers, the Last Day, and to believe in divine decree, both its good and its evil.' [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Faith, 8].

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْأَرْكَانُ هِيَ أَسَاسُ الْعَقِيدَةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi ruknovi su temelj ispravnog vjerovanja u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: These pillars are the foundation of the correct creed in Islam.

sentences.arabic: يَعِيشُ الْمُؤْمِنُ بِرَاحَةٍ عِنْدَمَا يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِيَدِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik živi u miru kada zna da je sve u Allahovim rukama.
sentences.translationEn: A believer lives in comfort when they know that everything is in Allah's hands.
